# INTENT

## User Request

Add WebP image compression on upload to reduce storage and traffic costs.

## Requested Outcome

Uploaded images should be converted/compressed to WebP on the server during upload so saved assets are lighter and cheaper to serve.

## Constraints

- Keep the change focused on the upload pipeline.
- Preserve the current project upload flow.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
